paper_title: An analysis of grass (Poaceae) pollen seasons in Lublin in 2001-2008

methods.description: Measurement of grass (Poaceae) pollen fall using the gravimetric method with a Durham sampler placed at a specific location and height, with pollen fall expressed per unit area per day or week.

steps.description: The sampler was placed in the western part of the city, in the Maria Curie-Skłodowska University Botanical Garden in Lublin (51 o 16`N, 22 o 30`E), 5 metres above ground level (220 m AMSL).
steps.searchable_summary: Set up pollen sampler at specified location and height.

steps.description: The measurement of grass (Poaceae) pollen fall was done by the gravimetric method with the use of a Durham sampler (D u r h a m , 1964).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect pollen using Durham sampler via gravimetric method.

steps.description: The pollen fall was expressed as the number of pollen grains per 1 cm -2 of slide surface, collected per day, in the years 2003, 2008 and per week (2001, 2002, 2004-2007).
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify pollen grains per unit area per time period.

methods.description: Analysis of measured pollen fall data to determine key characteristics of the pollen season, including onset, end, length, annual count, and periods of maximum concentration.

steps.description: On the basis of the results obtained, the date of the onset and end of the pollen season was determined...
steps.searchable_summary: Determine pollen season onset date from pollen concentration data.

steps.description: On the basis of the results obtained, the date of the onset and end of the pollen season was determined...
steps.searchable_summary: Determine pollen season end date from pollen concentration data.

steps.description: ...as well as the length of season...
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate pollen season length from onset and end dates.
Calculate annual total pollen count from pollen concentration data.
inputs: Pollen concentration data (grains/cm^2/day or grains/cm^2/week) for a year

steps.description: ...and the periods of their maximum concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify periods of maximum pollen concentrations from pollen concentration data.

methods.description: Obtaining daily meteorological data for specific parameters and time periods from a weather station to analyze their influence on the pollen season.

steps.description: The data were obtained from the weather station of the UMCS Institute of Meteorology and Climatology situated 3 km from the measurement site.
steps.searchable_summary: Obtain meteorological data from specified weather station.
inputs: Weather station location (UMCS Institute of Meteorology and Climatology)

steps.description: ...daily values of five weather elements were taken into account: maximum and minimum temperature, relative air humidity, precipitation and maximum wind velocity noted from May to August 2001-2008...
steps.searchable_summary: Filter meteorological data for daily values of max/min temperature, humidity, precipitation, max wind velocity from May to August for years 2001-2008.
inputs: Parameters (max temp, min temp, humidity, precipitation, max wind velocity)

steps.description: ...as well as minimum temperature of January in 2001-2008.
steps.searchable_summary: Filter meteorological data for minimum temperature in January for years 2001-2008.

methods.description: Calculation of Pearson's r correlation coefficients to examine the relationships between pollen season features and meteorological conditions.

steps.description: Pearson's r correlation coefficients were calculated... to examine the correlations between the particular season features and weather conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate Pearson's r correlation coefficients between pollen season features and meteorological variables.
inputs: Pollen season features (onset, end, length, annual count, peak periods)
Meteorological data (daily max/min temp, humidity, precipitation, max wind velocity May-Aug; Jan min temp)

steps.description: ...with the use of Statistica 7.1 StartSoft Inc. software...
steps.searchable_summary: Perform statistical analysis using specified software.
